description.content: Retrieves a list of products from the store.

query.description: The maximum number of results to show (maximum 250, default 50)
A unique ID used to access a specific page in results
Show only products specified by a comma-separated list of IDs

variable.description: The name of the Shopify store

response.name: Successful response with list of products

variable.description: The name of the Shopify store

The Shopify Admin REST API lets you build apps and integrations that extend and enhance the Shopify admin. It provides access to products, customers, orders, inventory, fulfillment, shipping, and store configuration. All requests require a valid Shopify access token. Note: Shopify is deprecating the REST Admin API in favor of GraphQL. New development should use the GraphQL Admin API.
